subcodes.first_line: O thou revered maidservant of God! Thy letter from Los Angeles was received... Not till the darkness of difference
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز محترمه الهی نامه تو از لوزآنجلیز رسید شکر کن خدا را که موفق بخدمت شدی
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @music and singing, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
